result.author: ThingPulse
result.text:
IoT Workshops • ThingPulse

Our IoT workshops are fun and educative. We emphasize an interactive setup with lots of hand-on exercises. Nobody is left behind.

result.author: Ivan Kravets
result.text:
A must-have tool for advanced embedded development!
I'm so proud of how @PlatformIO_Org grows! A few years ago it was #1 replacement for "Arduino IDE". Today, we have all the chance for a small revolution in the enterprise embedded market. Openness and neutrality will win!
